parameters.subject: MEDIA ALERT: Civic issue ignored for 30+ days
parameters.message:
={{ "MEDIA ALERT

A civic issue has been escalated to the highest level due to prolonged inaction.

Complaint ID: " + $("Build Escalation Email").item.json.complaintId + "

This issue has been unresolved for over 30 days and has received significant citizen confirmations. Public disclosure may be warranted.

Please review for potential media coverage." }}
